notes.purpose: Default Crystal Bastion balance configuration. Local override uses the same shape.

rifle.name: Assault Rifle
rifle.desc: High fire rate automatic. Melts groups.

sword.name: Sword
sword.desc: Melee arc attack. Hits all nearby enemies.

flamethrower.name: Flamethrower
flamethrower.desc: Continuous short-range fire cone. Burns enemies.

grenade.name: Grenade
grenade.desc: Arcing explosive. Destroys groups on impact.

boomerang.name: Boomerang
boomerang.desc: Returns to you, hitting enemies twice.

autoConstruct.label: Arcane Masons
autoConstruct.description: Hold Shift to auto-build towers while walking

standard.label: Standard Tower
standard.description: Balanced all-purpose tower. This is the default baseline for the current roster.

burst.label: Burst Tower
burst.description: More aggressive short-range tower with stronger hits and faster firing, but a smaller footprint.

support.label: Support Tower
support.description: Safer utility-focused tower with wider coverage and sturdier network support, trading raw damage for reach.

melee.label: Melee Tower
melee.description: Close-range tower that slams every enemy around itself instead of firing projectiles.

sniper.label: Sniper Tower
sniper.description: Very long-range single-target tower with heavy damage and a slower cadence.
